## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Passbolt and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content marketing and organic growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Passbolt, a B2B password manager, recently raised Series A funding and is looking to scale organic growth, particularly top-of-funnel lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation workflows and strategic guidance to accelerate organic growth, starting at $9k/month](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Sandro (Passbolt CMO) is interested in learning more about GrowthX's platform and services before potentially involving Passbolt's CEO](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Passbolt's Current Situation and Challenges

  - [Recently closed Series A funding, profitable before investment](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Main challenge: not enough leads at top of funnel, despite good conversion rates later in funnel](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Previous paid ad attempts were ineffective due to broad targeting (e.g. "best password manager")](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Current paid search is very focused but with low volume in B2B space](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Influencer marketing has been most effective channel so far (300% ROI)](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### Passbolt's Product and Market Position

  - [B2B password manager for teams, with unique encryption at individual password level](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Open-source with self-hosting option, appealing to government/military clients](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Primary use cases: centralizing passwords and secure password sharing within teams](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Current customer base mostly SMB IT/DevOps teams (3-10 admins)](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Passbolt's Marketing Strategy and Goals

  - [Aiming for 30% increase in captured leads over next 1.5-2 years](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Focus on organic growth, content marketing, and influencer partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Hiring a product marketing manager and conducting customer surveys](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Shifting from product-centric to customer value-focused messaging](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Exploring content expansion on website and YouTube influencer collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [AI-powered content creation workflows combined with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Focus on editorial and programmatic content, tailored to customer journey](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Platform allows flexible integration with various AI tools (e.g., Perplexity Pro)](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Team includes experienced SEO and content marketing professionals](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Emphasis on iterative process, continual calibration with client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

### Potential Collaboration Considerations

  - [Passbolt's European market focus requires less "awesome" and more grounded messaging](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [GDPR compliance is crucial for any new tools/partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [Budget starting at $9k/month, pending CEO approval and demonstration of value](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a 45-minute follow-up call to demo GrowthX's platform and discuss specifics](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2266.0)
  - [GrowthX to send proper calendar link for scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2292.0)
  - [Sandro to review platform demo before potentially involving Passbolt's CEO in discussions](https://fathom.video/share/6YPKDdcpjS4XxMmqPde4UV-9UxBL_c_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
